text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder has invited me to watch her dance
lesson.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I appreciate you making the time for this.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Your opinion will be really helpful to me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Let's do that last section once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's giving the rehearsal her all, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing the dance, she doesn't seem
satisfied with her performance.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The choreography for the chorus isn't clicking.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I understand the rhythm perfectly well, but I still
can't dance it as well as the others.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Do you have any idea what I'm doing wrong?
choice_data_list: What if you were more expressive?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Interesting. Perhaps I was too focused on finesse.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Perhaps if I hit the beat with more force...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll set aside the graceful imagery and try
visualizing martial arts during the main hook
instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems adding a bit of power to her step did the
trick.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You're right—that is a crucial aspect.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In my efforts to perfect the individual steps, I may
have refined away the dance's personality.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Racing demands a healthy dose of ambition, so
the same should hold true for winning concerts.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll try to convey the true depths of my feelings
which none of the others can surpass.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... this might make me appear a little bolder
than usual, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder returns to her dance practice with
more pep in her step.
